emails.subject: FW: Tenaska LDs
emails.body: John, This LD from Tenaska is still an issue. Are we going to pay it? Rebecca

emails.subject: RE: Tenaska LDs
emails.body: I am discussing this with Cara at Tenaska. She is going to send more support for this. JMF

emails.subject: FW: Tenaska LDs
emails.body: John, These LDs for 6/15/01 are still outstanding. From all my research I believe we owe Tenaska, but have not been able to determine whether we are at fault or need to pass the LD downstream. If I don't hear from you within the next couple of days I am going to enter the deal to pay Tenaska and wait until you respond before I bill the downstream counterparty. Rebecca
